nasb.text: So the people went by stealth into the city that day, as people who are humiliated steal away when they flee in battle.

esv.text: And the people stole into the city that day as people steal in who are ashamed when they flee in battle.

cnv.text: 那一天，眾人偷偷進城，就像軍人從戰場上逃跑，羞愧地偷偷回來一樣。

ccb.text: 那一天，众人都静悄悄地回城去，好像败兵一样羞愧万分。
